Rough Night (2017)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $22,105,643Details
International Box Office $24,738,714
Worldwide Box Office $46,844,357
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,448,157
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,127,799
Total $2,575,956
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Five best friends from college reunite 10 years later for a wild bachelorette weekend in Miami. Their hard partying takes a dark turn when they accidentally kill a male stripper. Amidst the craziness of trying to cover it up, they’re ultimately brought closer together when it matters most.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,004,283 (36.2% of total gross)
Legs:2.76 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:47.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,162 opening theaters/3,162 max. theaters, 2.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $29,474,188

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 16th, 2017 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: June 14th, 2017 (Wide) (Jamaica)
June 14th, 2017 (Wide) (Trinidad)
June 14th, 2017 (Wide) (Iceland)
June 15th, 2017 (Wide) (Aruba)
June 15th, 2017 (Wide) (Ukraine)
Video Release: August 25th, 2017 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for crude sexual content, language throughout, drug use and brief bloody images.
(Rating bulletin 2479 (Cert #50626), 6/7/2017)
Running Time: 101 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Ensemble, Screenplay Written By the Star
Plot point: Accidental Death, Covering Up an Accidental Death, Friends Reuniting, Parties Gone Wild
Social setting: Bachelor Party, College, Strippers / Stripping
Subgenre: Black Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Black Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Columbia Pictures, Matt Tolmach Productions, Paulilu
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Five best friends from college reunite 10 years later for a wild bachelorette weekend in Miami. Their hard partying takes a dark turn when they accidentally kill a male stripper. Amidst the craziness of trying to cover it up, they’re ultimately brought closer together when it matters most.
